title: デビュー戦の後に・姫の第一歩

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Traaaiiineeer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I-I just ran in my debut race! I persevered until the
very end!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'm going to continue working hard in
order to become the best runner ever. And then,
the G1 races...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ack! I mean…

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to gradually get used to regular races,
all so I can become my ideal princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her debut race, Kawakami Princess wasn't
anywhere near as tense as she was during her
previous scrimmages.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she continues honing her mind and body, it'll no
doubt result in immensely improved running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, one day...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Definitely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Kawakami Princess and I are leaving
Hanshin Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Kawakami Princess! Could I have a
moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but I'm on my way home! So I can't go
out for tea with you right now. Wouldn't you
agree, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Actually, I think he wants to interview you.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Is that so?! Very well, then—ask away!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you very much. Your running was
tremendous, and you have a charming
personality, too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Well, don't stop the compliments there!
choice_data_list:
We can't stay for long, so please, if you have
any questions...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'll get straight to the point then. What's
the next big race you've set your sights on? I'm
guessing it'll be the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, or
perhaps the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I have none!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: O-oh, I see... And why would that be?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My objective this year is to get used to racing!
And when the time comes, I'll burst out of
nowhere and blow everyone away!
choice_data_list:
That's why we're not set on any particular race
at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I see. By the way, can you tell me exactly when this time will come?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh... Well, of course, that will be...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...When will that be, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, now I'm all pumped! Make sure you keep
those eyes peeled and locked on my progress,
Mr. Reporter!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You really are an interesting pair. Thank
you for your responses!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some days later, in my office...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Up-and-Coming Umamusume: Kawakami
Princess! She promises she'll blow away the
competition, yet her goals remain secret."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
W-woooow! My comments were published in the
newspaper!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not on the front page, nor is it a feature
article—just a few lines tucked away in the corner.
But it's more than enough to get Kawakami
Princess hopping with happy excitement.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm going to build up more and more
racing experience and become a true princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, I need to enter her in plenty of races
and build up her fan base, until she has enough
experience to run any race without letting the
tension get to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll help her to improve both her mind and body,
one step at a time.
